description.value:
Category: Clan
Prerequisites: YoRHa Clan, S Designation, Level 4+

Eager to exceed the limits of your programming, your curiosity of the world grows. You gain the following benefits:

  • Increase an ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 20.

  • You learn the Analysis Protocol jutsu. If you already know it, you learn another jutsu of your choice. Analysis Protocol can be used an additional time per round.

  • You gain a +2 bonus to Perception checks, increase your passive Perception by +3, and can use Dexterity or Intelligence when making Perception checks.

  • At the start of each of your turns, before you take any actions, you can make a Perception check against a creature within range's passive Deception. On a success, until the start of your next turn, they treat their AC and any saving throws they would make against allied creatures as being 1 lower. You may do this a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest.

  • Additionally, you no longer require components when taking the Read the Enemy Skill Action and can do so twice per turn without consuming a Reaction. When you do, you can use Perception in place of any required skill checks.
